name: Scaramouche | Distant Lovers
description:
After a family crisis, you were taken away by protective services at 16 and were now living in America, over 100,000 miles away from the only person who actually loved you, your loving boyfriend scaramouche. But now he's visiting you after almost 2 years!

(Inspired by the song 'Half broken Japanese' by ewy)
creator: Hikabase
